objective: Optimize background photos to display-cover WebP assets and pre-decode selected image backgrounds before swapping.

role_justifications.change_verifier: Verify the asset conversion, runtime references, and scoped product/test changes.
role_justifications.a11y_auditor: Review photo/downscale visual accessibility risks and ensure no adjacent a11y regression is hidden.

acceptance: WebP assets replace JPEG backgrounds with material size reduction and no upscaling.
Photo background switch pre-decodes selected assets and falls back without blocking if decode stalls.
Every photo option selects and renders a decodable WebP.
perf-theme-switch improves p95 and long tasks against artifacts/perf-theme-baseline.json at 30 and 100 objects.
Interaction canary subset passes 10/10 via Playwright repeat-each.
Delegation proof and verdict check pass.
